scripts.depcruise:json: mkdir -p reports && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type json --output-to reports/dependency-cruiser-report.json
scripts.depcruise:dot: mkdir -p reports && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot --output-to reports/dependency-cruiser-graph.dot
scripts.depcruise:text: mkdir -p reports && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type text --output-to reports/dependency-cruiser-graph.txt
scripts.depcruise:mermaid: mkdir -p reports && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type mermaid --output-to reports/dependency-cruiser-graph.mmd
scripts.depcruise:html: mkdir -p reports && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type err-html --output-to reports/dependency-cruiser-report.html
scripts.depcruise:all: pnpm depcruise && pnpm depcruise:json && pnpm depcruise:dot && pnpm depcruise:text && pnpm depcruise:mermaid && pnpm depcruise:html
